sections.title: Standard dialogue before The Dig Site

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Good day to you. My name is Terry Balando; I am an expert on digsite finds.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: I am employed by the museum in Varrock to oversee all finds at this digsite. Anything you find must be reported to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok. If I find anything of interest I will bring it here.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have something I need checking out.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Okay, give it to me and I'll have a look for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Good, let me know if you find anything unusual.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me anything about the digsite?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Yes, indeed; I am studying the lives of the settlers. During the end of the third age there used to be a great city at the site.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Its inhabitants were humans, supporters of the god Saradomin. It's not recorded what happened to the community here.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: I suspect nobody has lived here for over a millennium!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the tools an archaeologist uses?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Of course! Let's see now... Rock picks are for splitting rocks or scraping away soil; you can get one from a cupboard in the Education Centre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about sample jars?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: I think you'll find them scattered about pretty much everywhere, but I know you can get one from a cupboard somewhere in the Education Centre, just like the rock pick!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, what about a specimen brush?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: We have a bit of a shortage of those at the moment. You could try borrowing one from a workman on the site... but I don't think they'd give it willingly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like I'll need to be sneaky to get one of those, then... Okay - trowel?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Ahh... that you must earn by passing your exams! The examiner holds those.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ahh, ok thanks.

sections.title: After The Dig Site

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Hello again. Was that translation any use to Asgarnia?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think it was, thanks!

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Hello again. I am now studying this mysterious altar and its inhabitants. The markings are strange...

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: It refers to a god I have never heard of before, named Zaros. It must be some pagan superstition.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: That was a great find; who knows what other secrets lie buried beneath the surface of our land...

sections.title: Talking to him while the player is wielding an ancient staff

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: That staff is incredible! It's the same symbol that was on that talisman you found here. Does this mean you've found out more about Zaros?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found out that he was banished, and that the people's hero was trapped in a pyramid and...

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: So you're the one who found out about that. I've heard the story from my friends in the museum. Well done on being able to wield such an impressive symbol.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Anyway....

sections.title: Using items
Using an ancient staff on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think of this?

sections.title: Using unidentified liquid on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what this is?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Where did you get this?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: From one of the barrels at the digsite.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: This is a VERY dangerous liquid called nitroglycerin. Be careful how you handle it. Don't drop it or it will explode!

sections.title: Using nitroglycerin on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me any more about this?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Nitroglycerin! This is a dangerous substance. This is normally mixed with other chemicals to produce a potent compound.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Be sure not to drop it! That stuff is highly volatile...

sections.title: Using ammonium nitrate on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Really, you do find the most unusual items. I know what this is - it's a strong chemical called ammonium nitrate. Why you want this I'll never know...

sections.title: Using mixed chemicals on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, look at this.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Hmm, that looks dangerous. Handle it carefully and don't drop it!

sections.title: Using mixed chemicals (with charcoal added) on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See what I have done with the compound now.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Seriously, I think you have a death wish! What on earth are you going to do with that stuff?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll find a use for it!

sections.title: Using the chemical compound on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think about this?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: What have you concocted now? Just be careful when playing with chemicals!

sections.title: Using nuggets on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have these gold nuggets...

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: I can't do much with these nuggets yet. Come back when you have 3 and I will exchange them for you.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Good – that's three; I can exchange them for normal gold now. You can get this refined and make a profit!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excellent!

sections.title: Using a needle on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a needle.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Hmm, yes; I wondered why this race were so well dressed! It looks like they had mastery of needlework.

sections.title: Using a rotten apple on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found these...

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Ew! Throw them away this instant!

sections.title: Using broken glass on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this glass.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Hey you should be careful of that. It might cut your fingers, throw it away!

sections.title: Using a broken arrow on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this arrow.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: No doubt this arrow was shot by a strong warrior – it's split in half! It is not a valuable object though.

sections.title: Using a panning tray on him

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: I have no need for panning trays!

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Have you searched this tray yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not that I remember...

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: It may contain something; I don't want to get my hands dirty.

sections.title: Using bones on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at these bones.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Ah, yes – a fine bone example... no noticeable fractures... and in good condition. These are common cow bones, however; they have no archaeological value.

sections.title: Using buttons on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found these buttons.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Let's have a look. Ah, I think these are from the nobility, perhaps a royal servant?

sections.title: Using a cracked sample on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this rock...

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: What a shame it's cracked; this looks like it would have been a good sample.

sections.title: Using an old tooth on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey look at this.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Oh, an old tooth. It looks like it has come from a mighty being. Pity there are no tooth fairies around here!

sections.title: Using a rusty sword on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found an old sword.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Oh, it's very rusty isn't it? I'm not sure this sword belongs here, it looks very out of place.

sections.title: Using a broken staff on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this staff.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Look at this... Interesting... This appears to belong to a cleric of some kind; certainly not a follower of Saradomin, however.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: I wonder if there was another civilization here before the Saradominists?

sections.title: Using broken armour on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found some armour.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: It looks like the wearer of this fought a mighty battle.

sections.title: Using damaged armour on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found some old armour.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: How unusual. This armour doesn't seem to match with the other finds. Keep looking.

sections.title: Using ceramic remains on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found some pottery pieces.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Yes, many parts are discovered. The inhabitants of these parts were great potters.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean they were good at using potions?

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: No, no, silly. They were known for their skill with clay.

sections.title: Using a belt buckle on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this unusual item...

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Let me see. This is a belt buckle. Not so unusual - I should imagine it came from a guard.

sections.title: Using an animal skull on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Hmm, an interesting find; an animal skull for sure. Another student found one just like this today.

sections.title: Using the special cup on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Looks like an award cup for some small find. Perhaps it belongs to one of the students?

sections.title: Using Teddy on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Why, it looks like a teddy bear to me. Perhaps someone's lucky mascot!

sections.title: Using an old boot on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Ah yes, an old boot. Not really an ancient artefact, is it?

sections.title: Using another ancient talisman on him
Using the invitation letter on him

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: There's no point in giving me this back!

sections.title: Using Stone tablet on him during The Dig Site

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this in a hidden cavern beneath the digsite.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Incredible!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There is an altar down there. The place is crawling with skeletons!

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Yuck!

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: This is an amazing discovery! All this while we were convinced that no other race had lived here.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: It seems the followers of Saradomin have tried to cover up the evidence of the Zaros altar. This whole city must have been built over it!

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: Thanks for your help; your sharp eyes have spotted what many have missed. Here, take this gold as your reward.

sections.title: Using Stone tablet on him post quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have a look at this.

lines.speaker: Terry Balando
lines.text: I don't need another tablet! One is enough, thank you.
